values.description: Plaintext client secret for /auth/token. Hash with nova-cipher argon2 and store the hash in nova_auth.tenant_secrets. See nova-commonux-api-guide.md → Seeding Required Data.
Set automatically by the collection pre-request script. Do not edit by hand.
Captured automatically from login/magic-link/social response. Used by the Refresh Token request.
Captured automatically from /auth/login when requires_2fa is true. Used by the Verify 2FA request.
